title: Undergraduate Researcher – CIVS at Purdue University Northwest
text: Undergraduate Researcher – CIVS at Purdue University Northwest Nov 2025 – Present | Hammond, IN • Accelerated end-to-end CV model training and evaluation cycles as part of ongoing research and development work, annotating image datasets, building preprocessing pipelines, and fine-tuning CNN-based architectures using Python and Roboflow; iterated on hyperparameter configurations to optimize model convergence. • Improved experiment reproducibility by maintaining structured model cards documenting preprocessing steps, architecture configs, hyperparameter settings, and evaluation metrics (accuracy, loss curves) across all training runs.

title: Machine Learning Intern – Poonawalla Fincorp
text: Machine Learning Intern – Poonawalla Fincorp Jun – Jul 2025 | Mumbai, India • Engineered features from 50K+ credit records (delinquency ratios, credit utilization, payment history) and built scikit-learn classification pipelines, training Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting models with grid search hyperparameter optimization, achieving AUC of 0.87 and KS of 42. • Operationalized model monitoring by applying product design thinking to build Power BI dashboards to track KPIs, score distributions, and model drift indicators in production, enabling data-driven credit policy decisions by stakeholders.

title: IT Intern – Sodel Solutions
text: IT Intern – Sodel Solutions Jun – Jul 2024 | Navi Mumbai, India • Reduced ETL pipeline failures by 15% by refactoring SQL queries, implementing automated schema validation, and adding data quality checks across ingestion workflows, improving downstream data reliability. • Improved data pipeline throughput by 20% by streamlining preprocessing logic, eliminating redundant transformation steps, and standardizing batch processing workflows for faster data load times.

title: Data Analytics Intern – KPMG
text: Data Analytics Intern – KPMG May – Jul 2023 | Mumbai, India • Reduced manual reporting turnaround by 30% by automating data validation and statistical analysis workflows using Python and SQL, integrating automated anomaly detection and outlier flagging. • Improved analytics reproducibility and auditability by standardizing KPI definitions, metric documentation, and testing procedures across client consulting engagements using structured reporting templates.

title: Tutor – PNW Student Academic Support Centre
text: Tutor – PNW Student Academic Support Centre Aug 2023 – May 2026 | Hammond, IN • Improved student exam performance by 20% on average through targeted tutoring in Mathematics, Computer Science, and Statistics, adapting problem-solving strategies to individual learning gaps.

title: AI Safety – Backdoor Attack Research (BATT) 2025
text: AI Safety – Backdoor Attack Research (BATT) 2025 • Reproduced 'BATT: Backdoor Attack with Transformation-Based Triggers' using PyTorch; implemented rotation(16 degrees) and translation (6px) geometric triggers on CIFAR-10 with a ResNet-18 classifier, achieving ASR of 98.9% and 99.67% respectively at a 5% poisoning rate. • Benchmarked BATT against the BadNets baseline across benign accuracy and attack success rate; demonstrated that geometric transformation triggers are stealthier and more effective than static pixel patches, with all attacks maintaining benign accuracy within 0.5% of the clean model(76.28%).

title: ID vs OOD Performance Prediction 2025
text: ID vs OOD Performance Prediction 2025 • Extended 'Agreement on the Line' paper by replacing its linear ID - OOD assumption with custom nonlinear neural regression models and Bayesian uncertainty estimation on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet, improving OOD performance prediction reliability. • Demonstrated that uncertainty-aware nonlinear models better capture distribution shift dynamics, contributing insights toward building more generalizable and reliable ML systems.

title: Heart Disease Risk Prediction 2025
text: Heart Disease Risk Prediction 2025 • Trained and benchmarked 6 classifiers (Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, SVM, KNN, Random Forest, Neural Network) with hyperparameter tuning and AUC/F1 evaluation on a multi-state healthcare dataset; performed EDA, feature selection, and cross-validation to identify the best model for early detection. • Compared model interpretability vs. predictive performance trade-offs across classical ML and neural approaches, selecting optimal architecture for deployment in a healthcare decision-support context.

title: MNIST Classifier
text: MNIST Classifier 2025 • Achieved 98% test accuracy on 70K+ images using Logistic Regression with L2 regularization, batch processing, and stratified k-fold cross-validation to maximize generalization on held-out data. • Applied feature normalization and systematic hyperparameter tuning to optimize model performance, validating results against a held-out test set using accuracy and confusion matrix metrics.

title: Microsoft Stock Price Prediction – LSTM Neural Network
text: Microsoft Stock Price Prediction – LSTM Neural Network 2025 • Built a stacked LSTM neural network in TensorFlow/Keras to forecast Microsoft closing prices using a 60-day sliding window sequence; applied StandardScaler normalization, Dropout regularization, and Adam optimizer with MSE loss over 20 epochs. • Performed EDA including open/close trend analysis, volume visualization, and feature correlation heatmap; enforced strict temporal train/ test split (95/5) to prevent data leakage in time series forecasting
